announcement_bar_text: Free shipping on orders above ₹2,999 | Handcrafted in Mumbai | WhatsApp us at +91 98699 39003
whatsapp_message_template: Hi! I am interested in the following products from Ria Art Jewellery:
footer_about: Ria Art Jewellery is a Mumbai-based handcrafted jewellery brand specialising in bridal, festive, and occasion jewellery. Every piece is crafted with love by our artisans in Malad West, Mumbai.
